feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business Application Studio
feed.subtitle: SAP Business Application Studio Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: My BAS dev space remains in status "Starting"
entry.content:
My BAS dev space remains in status "Starting" for a long time, ID "ws-4rjd9"

It is not a free account, How do resolve this? Any inputs?

entry.title: How to call a Rest API in a Fiori App and show the result in a List
entry.content:
I want to develop a Fiori App which i can later add to the Fiori Launchpad. The App should call a REST API, and the result of the API should be displayed as a list in the Fiori App. 

I did create a few Fiori Apps with the SAP Tutorials, like this one https://developers.sap.com/group.sap-fiori-app-purchase-req.html 

All the tutorials i completed used eclipse to create Services, which i can access from SAP Business Application Studio. I understand that these Services in Eclipse are so called CDS Views, which only show Data from a Database. Can i also show Data from a API in these CDS Views or do i need to use another Technology for my requirement?

The Fiori App should work in an On-Premise System and in the ABAP-Cloud.

entry.title: HANA Cloud / Hana procedure execution by multiple instances/workers
entry.content:
Hello Colleagues,

I have a procedure which mostly take some entries from a table(built as a queue) and then sends the values as input parameters to a calculation view and the result inserts in a table.
The thing is that the amount of records is huge(hundreds of millions) so i was searching for kind of paralel execution.
With the execute parallel explicit statement in a procedure it wouldn't work, because of concurency, but with multiple procedure runs it works.
Could anyone give me some insights in this direction? how to run multiple times the same proc to improve the processing time? Are there any limitations? Which setting should be changed in hana?


Thank you in advance,

Best regards,

Ghenadie

entry.title: Hello Experts, Is there a way to extend sap fiori app ( Request Material MDG ) in BAS
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Is there a way to extend sap fiori app ( Request Material MDG ) in BAS. 

when creating adaptation project in BAS we are not getting the option to extend for this particular app. 

or is there any other way to extend this app. 

P.S : SAP WEB IDE is not available as account is in cloud foundry environment.

entry.title: Loading Reuse S1 Component from Manage Material coverage app gives errors
entry.content:
Hi folks,

I have deployed pp_mrp_reuses1(F0844) component as a custom library into abap repo. my aim is to run the extended version of app Manage Material Coverage(F0251) which should use a fragment of my custom library where i have extended my fields for the table.. To open Manage material i already have extended Monitor Material coverage app(F0247A).  all three apps are deployed onto the repository.

 
Problem i am facing is when i navigate from monitor materials to manage materials app i am getting an error from the library files of the standard reuse component pp_mrp_reuses1.
I am able to load my custom Reuse Library that i can see from sources but error comes up in the standard part of the library somehow. Random errors in S3parent of standard reuse component come-up.
I see all three extended/adapted apps running in the sources.
For navigation i am using 
sap.ushell.Container.getService("CrossApplicationNavigation")  
toExternal method. with my semantic object action and parameters opening my extended version of the manage materials app.
So confused as to what piece of this puzzle is a miss??

entry.title: Bind App to hdi-container with specific role or read-only privilege (cloud foundry)
entry.content:
Hi,

I would like to bind an application to a hdi-container in such way that the application can only read from it.

So either to specify somewhere grant the role "XXX" to _RT  or restrict the privilege to SELECT on the schema.

Any idea how to perform this restriction ?

Thank you

Yann

entry.title: Sap Business One 10.00 update SP 2402
entry.content:
I would like to ask if anyone is facing the same problem as me.

We updated our system from version 10.0 (10.00.240) FP 2305 to version 10.0 (10.00.240) SP 2402 and we are experiencing slowdowns on several computers after this update.

Before the update, we did not have this problem.

Computers keep freezing the screen, slow to open other applications.

After restarting the computer it works fine for a moment, until it starts to crash again after a few minutes of using SAP.

What is happening?

entry.title: Problems when opening a PDF in my SAPUI5 app
entry.content:
Hello Experts, good day.

I have the following doubt.

We are using PDFViewer to be able to view a PDF document in a fiori app.

The problem is that when we call it, PDFViewer does not show the PDF and immediately afterward, it opens a window to download the file.

Do you know why this is happening?

This is the code I use for the PDFViewer.

 

 

                var sServiceURL = ".../ZFI_LIBRO_INV_PDF_SRV";
                var sSource = sServiceURL + "/pdfSet('" + sociedad + "," +  ejercicio + "," + perContable + "," + ledger + "," + A4Digitos +"')/$value";

                    var opdfViewer = new PDFViewer({
                        loaded: function (oEvent) {
                     }, error: function (oError) {                            
                     }, sourceValidationFailed: function (oEvent) {
                     } });
                    
                     opdfViewer.setSource(sSource);
                     opdfViewer.setTitle("Libro Inventario");
                     opdfViewer.open();

 

 

Could it be how the PDF was created in Odata that is causing this? Or is it some particular issue about how my call was made?

Any help is welcome.

And I can't tell you how the Odata was made or so, since I don't have access to that part of the Project due to permissions issues.

Thanks so much for reading

Greetings

EBZ.

entry.title: Not able to select the element in SAP IRPA
entry.content:
I'm creating role creation automation based on the mentioned link

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/sap-rpa-2-0-challenge-submission-automate-sap-ecc-authorization-roll-out/ba-p/13499447

I've created till sap access, for the role maintenance I'm not able to select the element in SAP IRPA in the capture screen of role creation.

Attaching the picture of the captured and where I need to define element.

If anyone knows solution on this. please help me on this.

entry.title: can anyone recommend the course for development in sap b1 for adding form, different addon
entry.content:
I am new here .

i wanna develop  a form using sap b1 studio and using ui api , di api .

using these tech stack i wannna create an addon, so can anyone suggest the best suited course for me designed by sap.

entry.title: Corporate Git Setup on SAP BTP versus connecting to Corporate Git directly from SAP BAS
entry.content:
Hello,

We are planning to use Corporate Azure Repository for source code/version control management for the SAP Fiori developments done from SAP Business Application Studio. 

We are able to connect to Corporate Azure Repo from SAP Business Application studio using Git commands and push our changes to/from Repo.

We also found this document from SAP where it talks about setting up Cloud connector etc for Connecting to Corporate Git repository from SAP Business Application Studio.

Connecting to a Corporate Git Repository | SAP Help Portal

 

Question: Since we are able to connect to Corporate Git Repo without Cloud connector setup, may i know what is the use case where we need to use / follow the instruction for connecting to Corporate Git as mentioned in SAP Document above?

 

Regards,

Abdul Hakim

entry.title: git command to connect to BTP Destination pointing to Git repo
entry.content:
Hello experts,

How do we specify the Git destination created on BTP to corporate git repo in Git command?

For instance Destination name is "gitrepo1" which points to corporate git account for example http://github.e/8042

when we use git clone <git repo>   -- how we need to specify the destination name here in this command

 

Regards,

Abdul Hakim

entry.title: I am not able to find the entries for KZ documents type in FBL1N T code. Can you pls advise?
entry.content:
I am not able to find documents type KZ in FBL1N t code. As I am trying to extract data for few profit centers in our division.

Can you please advise how can I extract KZ documents?

 

Thanks

entry.title: SSAM 2310 Deploy Error: "ReferenceError: chalk is not defined"
entry.content:
Since about two days we get the following error "ReferenceError: chalk is not defined" when trying to deploy Asset Manager 2310 app from Visual Studio Code on to Mobile Services. We haven't been able to resolve it. How can this be resolved?

Best regards,
Gonzalo.

entry.title: Deploy failed. Detail: Request failed with status code 500
entry.content:
Hello everybody,

I have this error Deploy failed. Detail: Request failed with status code 500 when I try to deploy on Mobile services. Could you someone help me with this error?

Best regards,

Angel Gutierrez

entry.title: Consuming on-Premise Service in CAP Project
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I am trying to consume an on-premise service in the CAP project using the destination. My SAP BTP Subaccount is connected to on-premise system via Cloud Connector.

In my existing CAP project, I have added the External Service (on-premise) by following steps as --> Service Center > Select Provider as 'SAP SYSTEM' > Catalog of Services as <my on-premise system> > Selected the service that I want > Selected the Entity that I wanted to add in my existing CAP project. (as shown in below screenshot)

Once service has been added in the CAP project, then automatically one 'external' folder along with one .cds file & one .js file got added in srv folder and in package.json file below changes got added. 

( below code is in package.json > cds > requires )

Then I have build & deployed the MTA project. When I run the external service from the deployed applications at space level then I am getting 502 error as 'Error during request to remote service: Failed to load destination.' (as shown in below screenshot)

Note - 1) This destination is used by UI team where it is working fine. 2) We are not able to get the service data even in local testing by cds watch.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: How to show custom Data in a Fiori App (RAP)
entry.content:
How can i show Data in a Fiori List App, when the Data is not in a Database. Every tutorial i did for SAP Fiori Apps included CDS Views, which only showed Data from a Database.

So Is there any way to show Data in the List App when the Data is not in a Database?

entry.title: Print Array in email, Fiori application - (webcontent) SAP BUILD automation, not working
entry.content:
Hi,

I downloaded a project from SAP BUILD store, and it contains WebContent (html files) which triggered from workflow. I need to print table (array) in email.

In html file, I am able to print  ${context.assetDetails.assetItem[0].fromCompanyCode} but not able to print complete table by using <script>  </script> for table array $.context.assetDetails.assetItem. Code shown below.

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

<table id="assetTable">
        <tr>
            <td style="font-weight:bold">From CompanyCode</td>
            <td style="font-weight:bold">From Asset Number</td>
            <td style="font-weight:bold">Sub Number</td>
            <td style="font-weight:bold">Asset Description</td>
            <td style="font-weight:bold">From CostCente</td>
            <td style="font-weight:bold">Capitalization Date</td>
            <td style="font-weight:bold">**bleep**. Acquis. Value</td>
            <td style="font-weight:bold">Accum. Dep. Value</td>
            <td style="font-weight:bold">Net Book Value</td>
            <td style="font-weight:bold">Transfer</td>
            <td style="font-weight:bold">Amount Posted</td>
            <td style="font-weight:bold">To CompanyCode</td>
            <td style="font-weight:bold">To Asset Number</td>
            <td style="font-weight:bold">Asset Sub Number</td>
            <td style="font-weight:bold">Asset Description</td>
            <td style="font-weight:bold">Asset Class</td>
            <td style="font-weight:bold">To Cost Center</td>
            <td style="font-weight:bold">Asset Status</td>
        </tr>
    </table>
        <tr></tr>
        <script>
            populateTable();
            function populateTable() {
                const table = document.getElementById("assetTable");
                var assetItem = [];
                assetItem = $.context.assetDetails.assetItem;
                assetItem.forEach(item => {
                    const row = table.insertRow(-1); // Inserts a row at the end of the table
                    Object.values(item).forEach(value => {
                        const cell = row.insertCell(-1); // Inserts a cell at the end of the row
                        cell.textContent = value; // Sets the text content of the cell
                    });
                });
            }
        </script>
        <tr></tr>
        <td>${context.assetDetails.assetItem[0].fromCompanyCode}</td>
        <td>${context.assetDetails.assetItem[0].fromAssetNumber}</td>
        <td>${context.assetDetails.assetItem[0].fromAssetdescription}</td>
        <td>${context.assetDetails.assetItem[0].cumulativeacquistionvalue}</td>
        <td>${context.assetDetails.assetItem[0].cumulativeacquistionvalue}</td>
        <td>${context.assetDetails.assetItem[0].accumulateddepreciationvalue}</td>
        <td>${context.assetDetails.assetItem[0].netbookvalue}</td>
        <td>${context.assetDetails.assetItem[0].transferPercent}</td>
        <td>${context.assetDetails.assetItem[0].amountposted}</td>
        <td>${context.assetDetails.assetItem[0].toCostCenter}</td>
        <td>${context.assetDetails.assetItem[0].toAssetNumber}</td>
        <td>${context.assetDetails.assetItem[0].toAssetSubNumber}</td>
        <td>${context.assetDetails.assetItem[0].toAssetNumberDescription}</td>
        <td>${context.assetDetails.assetItem[0].assetClass}</td>
        <td>${context.assetDetails.assetItem[0].toCostCenter}</td>
        <td>${context.assetDetails.assetItem[0].assetStatus}</td>        

    <pre>${context.internal.successMsg}</pre>
    <pre>${context.internal.errorMsg}</pre>

    <br><br>
    <p>Thank You.</p>

entry.title: Dealy in updating custom values for Visibility Scenario SAP BUILD AUTOMATION
entry.content:
Hi

I downloaded the “Fixed Asset Transfer Approval Management” project from the BUILD project.  The visibility dashboard “com.sap.content.Fixed_Assets_Transfer_Approval” was also downloaded along with this project. I added a new custom attribute “InventoryField” and “InventoryField” for this visibility scenario.

 

On the first day, the values were not populating in the newly added field. I thought that either the value was not present or there is some issue in coding. After many many tries, the value never populated.

 

On 2ND day, when I ran the scenario, the value populated.   After that, I changed the mapping to a new value but the system still showed the old mapping value.   It seems there is a delay in updating values for newly added attributes.

 

Let me know if I am missing anything, these are the steps I performed after each code deployment.  I know many of them are not necessary each time I change code but still, I performed all these steps with the hope that it will update the value in Visibility scenario

 

  1. Business Application studio :
    1. BUILD Project
    2. Then DEPLOY project
  2. Cloud Foundry SUBACCOUNT:
    1. Refresh HTML5 Applications
  3. SAP BUILD:
    1. Go to Lobby a Visibility scenario -- Process -- Reimport Template again and Activate
    2. Go to MonitoringàVisibility Scenario --Process data again (Though we have job after every 5 minutes)
  4. SAP BUILD WORKZONE
    1. Go to Content Channel and click on “Update Content.”

entry.title: Integrating CDS action in SAP Mobile Services for Data Retrieval
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am currently developing an application on BAS using SAP Mobile Services and I've encountered a challenge with integrating an OData service (CDS action) to read data from the following endpoint:

https://***.sap.***.com:PortNr/sap/opu/odata4/sap/zapi_entity_v4/***/sap/zapi_entity/0001/Entity/com.sap.gateway.***.zapi_entity.v0001.getData(serialNr='12345')

My objective is to retrieve data from this service and present it within e.g. Form Cells in the application. However, I am unsure how to proceed in terms of:

  1. Reading the data from the above mentioned endpoint and binding it to Form Cells.
  2. Configuring this integration within the SAP Mobile Service ( SAP Business Application Studio ). Specifically, I am unclear about the most appropriate configuration to use, such as a Rest Service Target, Function Call Target, or another metho
  3. Understanding the best practices and any necessary steps within this integration process.

Could anyone provide guidance or an example on how to properly configure the SAP Mobile Services for this use case? Additionally, any advice on binding the data to Form Cells once it's retrieved would be greatly appreciated

Thank you in advance for your support.

Best regards,
Khaled
